race.comment: MILITARY ACTION (5) was very impressive last start when winning a CL2 here 15 days ago. The query is the rise in trip, but the inside draw should see him get every chance in the run. Looks the one to beat if he can run up to his latest performance. SPACE ACADEMY (6) missed narrowly at Rockingham last start when a $1.55 favourite following some good form in better company prior. Maps nicely from the gate and he looks right up to this grade on recent form. MONTY ZOOMER (3) is a speedy customer and can find the front from barrier eight. The claim of Li is a big tick and they'll look to use the light weight up front. Out to the mile is a big tick and he shapes to go one better this time. PLEASE MIZTER (2) can improve getting out to 1600m today. HIGH PRECISION (9) draws nicely today stepping up in trip and can play a leading role.
